description_long: This object consists of two types of containers for Aveeno baby daily care lotion: a tall, oval-shaped bottle with a pump dispenser and two shorter, wide tubes with flat blue caps. The bottle is primarily off-white with subtle vertical stripes, blue accents at the base and neck, and a white pump mechanism on top. The tubes are also off-white with blue caps and feature similar branding and text, with a gentle, minimalist design. All containers display the Aveeno logo, product name, and delicate botanical illustrations in muted tones. The overall appearance is clean, soft, and designed to evoke a sense of gentleness suitable for baby care. The packaging is made of plastic and is likely lightweight, with the pump and caps being functional components for dispensing lotion.
description: A set of Aveeno baby daily care lotion containers, including a pump bottle and two tubes, all in soft off-white with blue accents and gentle botanical graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pump bottle and both tubes with clear branding, product name, and botanical graphics.
description_view_1: Side view of the pump bottle, highlighting its oval profile and the blue base and neck, with the pump visible from the side.
description_view_2: Reverse arrangement of the tubes and pump bottle, showing the back of the tubes and the front of the pump bottle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the pump bottle, focusing on the pump mechanism and the bottle's slim profile.
